FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.30sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f298058b560>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-12T21:40:21Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-12T21:38:40Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/12 21:42:03.983327297 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983333306 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983416431 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983417292 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983436020 {
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983436702 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983449601 new <- list()
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983450352 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983463392 new$width <- width
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983464073 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983477633 new$height <- height
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983478324 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983491924 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983492585 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983506066 new$title <- title
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983508710 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983522220 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983522921 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983536341 new$version <- version
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983537082 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983550843 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983551654 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983565044 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983565715 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983643933 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983645034 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983657783 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983658454 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983671494 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983672195 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983724549 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983726852 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983758459 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983759461 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983773883 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983774664 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983788965 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983789686 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983821734 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983822476 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983836396 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983837208 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983854013 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983854914 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983871529 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983872230 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983887743 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983888555 "default"))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983903898 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983904759 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983918299 }
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983919020 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983933552 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983934293 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983948605 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983949386 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983963698 }
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983964379 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983977007 }
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983977779 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983990267 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/12 21:42:03.983990968 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984004749 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984005500 domain = NA)
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984020132 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984020853 }
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984033622 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984034314 old$family <- family
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984048585 }
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984049326 version <- old$version
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984061114 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984061845 "2.0")
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984075245 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984076096 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984092431 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984093182 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984108094 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984108815 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984125210 domain = NA)
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984125991 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984142175 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984143047 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/12 21:42:03.984161595 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
